trigger.description: The caller passes --insecure-skip-hmac, so resume loads an unsigned or tampered capsule but marks the response as high-severity degraded and records an audit row when the workspace DB is available.
setup_commands:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
p='capsule.json'
d=json.load(open(p))
d['sections'][0]['content']='tampered content'
open(p,'w').write(json.dumps(d, indent=2))
PY

expected_emission.repair_string: Recreate the capsule without --insecure-skip-hmac before trusting it.
